articles.title: Cathie Wood Buys The Tesla Dip: Ark Snaps Up $14 Million Of TSLA Stock Across These 3 ETFs
articles.summary: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest has purchased approximately $14 million worth of Tesla (TSLA) stock across three of its ETFs (ARKK, ARKQ, ARKX) despite a recent dip in the company's share price. This move aligns with optimistic analyst predictions regarding Tesla's vehicle deliveries, robotaxi fleet expansion, and Full Self-Driving system enhancements. Additionally, Ark Invest made other key trades, selling shares in companies like Teradyne, BWX Technologies, Cameco, and Strata Critical Medical.

articles.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK sells Teradyne stock, buys more Tesla
articles.summary: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest has adjusted its portfolio on April 8th, 2026, selling a significant number of Teradyne (TER) and Roku (ROKU) shares through its ARKQ, ARKK, and ARKW ETFs. Simultaneously, ARK increased its stake in Tesla (TSLA) and made new purchases in Kodiak AI (KDK), GeneDx Holdings (WGS), and Arcturus Therapeutics (ARCT), demonstrating a dynamic investment strategy across technology and biotechnology sectors.

articles.title: 5 Burning Questions About Elon Musk’s Terafab Chip Partnership with Intel
articles.summary: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan announced a partnership with Elon Musk for his Terafab project, an ambitious chip development and fabrication operation for SpaceX and Tesla. The article discusses five key questions about this partnership, including its scope, Intel's specific contributions, customization levels for Musk, intellectual property control, and the practicalities of construction and labor. Analysts express skepticism about the project's feasibility given its scale and capital intensity, but suggest Intel's advanced packaging capabilities could be an initial focus.
articles.text_to_analyze: 5 Burning Questions About Elon Musk’s Terafab Chip Partnership with Intel. Analysts express skepticism about the project's feasibility given its scale and capital intensity, but suggest Intel's advanced packaging capabilities could be an initial focus.

articles.title: BMO (BERZ) US$1.362M autocallable notes tied to Tesla & NVIDIA (BERZ)
articles.summary: Bank of Montreal is offering US$1.362 million in Autocallable Barrier Notes linked to the performance of Tesla and NVIDIA common stock. These notes offer a potential contingent coupon of 1.75% per month but expose investors to principal loss if the least performing asset falls below its trigger level. The offering highlights the risks associated with structured products, including credit risk, lack of liquidity, and potential conflicts of interest.

articles.title: JPMorgan Is Still Betting That Tesla Stock Will Plunge 60% from Here
articles.summary: JPMorgan has reiterated its bearish "Underweight" rating on Tesla (TSLA) stock, setting a price target of $145, which implies a 60% downside from current levels. This stance comes after Tesla missed Q1 2026 delivery forecasts, facing slowing global EV sales, increased competition, and fading subsidies. Despite Tesla's efforts in AI and robotics, and a cautiously optimistic outlook from CEO Elon Musk, JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman highlighted a "record surge in unsold vehicles" and reduced EPS forecasts for the company.

articles.title: Musk's Terafab Bet With Intel: Can it Challenge NVIDIA's AI Chip Lead?
articles.summary: Elon Musk's Terafab project, a $20-25 billion semiconductor facility in Giga Texas, has partnered with Intel to vertically integrate AI hardware production for Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI. This ambitious undertaking aims to address a looming AI chip shortage and could potentially challenge NVIDIA's dominance by allowing Musk's companies to control their chip supply chain. While it offers control and scalability for Musk's ventures, its long-term impact on NVIDIA's market lead, especially given NVIDIA's strong software ecosystem, remains to be seen.
articles.text_to_analyze: Musk's Terafab Bet With Intel: Can it Challenge NVIDIA's AI Chip Lead?. This ambitious undertaking aims to address a looming AI chip shortage and could potentially challenge NVIDIA's dominance by allowing Musk's companies to control their chip supply chain. While it offers control and scalability for Musk's ventures, its long-term impact on NVIDIA's market lead, especially given NVIDIA's strong software ecosystem, remains to be seen.

articles.title: Discontinued Tesla Model S, Model X Now Significantly More Expensive
articles.summary: Despite being discontinued, Tesla has increased the price of their remaining Model S and Model X vehicles by $15,000 each. This unusual move for end-of-production inventory means the Model S now starts at $111,380 and the Model X at $116,380, both including destination charges. The article details the updated pricing and specifications for the electric vehicles, which are only available in all-wheel drive configurations.

articles.title: Intel stock is gaining and it has Elon Musk to thank
articles.summary: Intel's stock is experiencing a significant surge, up over 40% year-to-date, following a crucial partnership announcement with the Terafab project, led by Elon Musk's companies Tesla, xAI, and SpaceX. This collaboration positions Intel as a key provider of manufacturing and packaging expertise for Musk's ambitious goal of achieving one terawatt of compute power per year, signaling a major strategic endorsement for Intel's foundry unit. Analysts are bullish, with Lynx Equity raising Intel's price target to $70, citing robust execution and underestimations of its growth potential by the market.

articles.title: Tesla files site plan for 'ecological paradise'
articles.summary: Tesla has filed a site plan for the restoration of 28 acres of riverfront land at its Gigafactory Texas, proposing an "ecological paradise" open to the public. This project, which includes walking trails and an elevated boardwalk, comes years after it was first pitched and after environmental groups called for accountability on Tesla's promises for the area. The company's latest compliance report, while not explicitly mentioning the eco-park, detailed green building initiatives, signaling potential progress on the long-awaited project.
